rulings.Case Title: PEI JIAN LI ET AL VS. PATRICK BLACKBURN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Contest Or Dispute Good Faith Of Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 10, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT BAY BUILT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, ALEXANDER MOSA Motion To Contest Or Dispute Good Faith Of Settlement is DENIED. No showing made that Tech-Built factors are not met. i.e. that the settlement is not made in good faith. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PEI JIAN LI ET AL VS. PATRICK BLACKBURN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 10, 2019 line 1. Application For Good Faith Settlement GRANTED. Moving party met the Tech-Built factors. No showing to the contrary by the opposing defendant. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FILLMORE MANOR, LLC VS. TALIA KHAYET ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 10, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT EMILY HADDAD, CAITLIN BARKER, JULIA LEMKE, RICHARD WOOD, BRYAN QUINTERO, RACHEL AMALIA, TALIA KHAYAT, CHAD BANK DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to December 31, 2019 (holding date) pending the outcome of Mr. Bank's Rent Board Petition. Moving party to file a supplemental brief re: any additional/different arguments in light of the outcome of the Rent Board Petition no later than 2 weeks before the new hearing date; Opposing party to file a supplemental opposition no later than 1 week before the new hearing date. The hearing date and the due dates for supplemental briefing may be advanced/continued per ex-parte application should the Rent Board decision be rendered earlier/later. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VOZIKES 2017 LLC VS. JAZDALE INVESTMENTS LLC RELEAF HERBAL COOPERATIVE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn An Mtn To Be Declared Prevailing Party And For An Award Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees & Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 10, 2019 line . DEFENDANT JAZDALE INVESTMENTS LLC, RELEAF HERBAL COOPERATIVE, INC. Ntc Of Mtn An Mtn To Be Declared Prevailing Party And For An Award Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees & Costs is OFF CALENDAR, per request of the moving party. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC. VS. SHARON GOULD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 10, 2019 line . DEFENDANT SHARON GOULD DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Demurrer is not supported by Points and Authorities. Additionally, there is no proof of service for this demurrer on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: AGUSTIN MACEDO VS. LESLIE CORDERO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 10, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT LESLIE CORDERO, ALYSSA VELASQUEZ DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/CFH)
